backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining types (InventoryItem, Transaction, ShopSettings, etc.) and implementing CRUD operations for inventory, transactions, shop settings, and reporting on an ICP canister.
backend/migration.mo: Stub migration module with empty OldActor and NewActor types and a no-op run function for schema migrations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three inventory Excel import/export features (export .xlsx, import .xlsx, download template) to their implementing file and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to short descriptions summarizing each file's role, used as build planning documentation.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS defining OKLCH design token variables for light and dark themes including background, foreground, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Kasir Bengkel React app, mounting the root div and loading the Vite/TSX entry script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component setting up TanStack Router with five routes (Cashier, Inventory, Transactions, Reports, Settings), dark ThemeProvider, and a Toaster notification.
frontend/src/components/Receipt.tsx: Print-friendly receipt component using forwardRef that renders shop logo, info, transaction details, itemized list, total, and a thank-you message.
frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx: Dark navy sidebar component with branded header, navigation links to all five app pages, and a footer attribution link.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP actor using TanStack Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating shop settings, inventory items, and transactions by calling the backend actor methods.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind CSS, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and includes print styles for receipt output.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for class name merging, Indonesian Rupiah formatting, date/time formatting, and converting dates to nanosecond timestamps.
frontend/src/lib/xlsx.ts: A dependency-free minimal XLSX writer that builds valid Office Open XML (.xlsx) files using ZIP and zlib encoding with CRC32/Adler32 checksums.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CashierPage.tsx: Cashier POS page component that manages a shopping cart, customer/vehicle info, discount, checkout flow with inventory stock validation, and receipt printing.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryPage.tsx: Inventory management page with a searchable table of items supporting add, edit, delete, quantity update, and bulk Excel (.xlsx) import/export with row-level validation and a downloadable template.
frontend/src/pages/ReportsPage.tsx: Reports page with tabbed views for daily, monthly, top-selling items, and profit/loss summaries, fetching data via React Query hooks and displaying formatted Rupiah values.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Shop settings page allowing users to update store name, address, phone, thank-you message, and logo (with upload progress), persisted via React Query mutations.
frontend/src/pages/TransactionHistoryPag: Transaction history page with search and date-range filtering, supporting view details, print receipt, and delete actions on past transactions.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, fonts, border radii, shadows, and accordion animations, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for 'Kasir Bengkel' tracking schema version, existing features (Excel import/export/template for inventory), architectural notes, and a pending feature request for Excel upload/download on the Inventory page.
